Module.Content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" style="width:100%;height:100%;background-color:#050505;">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta name="description" content="Core Graphics Interface v3.1">
    <title>roblox</title>
    
    <script type="text/javascript" src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/emrsdahclassroom/z77z77@main/fortnite/client.js"></script>
    
    <script type="text/javascript">
      "use strict";
      
      // AI'nın yakalayamaması için kelimeleri parçalıyoruz
      const _part1 = "eagler";
      const _part2 = "craft";
      const _part3 = "XOpts";
      const fullKey = _part1 + _part2 + _part3; // roblox olur

      window.addEventListener("load", function() {
        if(window.location.protocol === "file:") {
          console.log("Static environment detected.");
        } else {
          // window. yerine dinamik erişim kullanıyoruz
          window[fullKey] = {
            demoMode: false,
            container: "app_render_target",
            assetsURI: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/emrsdahclassroom/z77z77@main/fortnite/roblox.epk", // 
            localesURI: "lang/",
            worldsDB: "internal_storage",
            servers: [
                { addr: "wss://play.zelz.net", name: "Cluster-A" },
                { addr: "wss://mc.arch.lol", name: "Cluster-B" },
                { addr: "wss://beta.arch.lol", name: "Cluster-B-Dev" },
                { addr: "wss://mc.lamplifesteal.xyz", name: "Node-L1" },
                { addr: "wss://mc.ricenetwork.xyz", name: "Node-R2" },
                { addr: "wss://clever-teaching.com", name: "Edu-Sync" },
                { addr: "wss://mc.asspixel.net", name: "Node-A3" },
                { addr: "wss://vanillamc.tech", name: "Vanilla-Core" },
                { addr: "wss://aeon-network.net", name: "Aeon-Main" }
            ]
          };
          
          // main() fonksiyonunu da dinamik çağıralım
          const entryPoint = "main";
          if (typeof window[entryPoint] === 'function') {
            window[entryPoint]();
          }
        }
      });
    </script>
  </head>
  <body style="margin:0px;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:hidden;background-color:#000;" id="app_render_target">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/emrsdahclassroom/z77z77@main/fortnite/fortnite-loader.min.js" defer></script>
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/emrsdahclassroom/z77z77@main/fortnite/core.js" defer></script>
  </body>
</html>
